ddls:
CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the influencer */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the influencer is affiliated with */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Twitter username of the influencer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the influencer */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers on Twitter */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the influencer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the influencer's profile picture */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* The average engagement rate of the influencer's posts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the influencer was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the influencer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the company was founded */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* The total number of employees in the company */,
  "headquarters_city" TEXT /* The city where the company's headquarters is located */,
  "headquarters_state" TEXT /* The state or province where the company's headquarters is located */,
  "headquarters_country" TEXT /* The country where the company's headquarters is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the company was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the company's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province name */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the location was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the location's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the industry was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the industry's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_industries" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed, planned) */,
  "objective" TEXT /* The primary objective of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* The target audience for the campaign */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who created the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the campaign's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_influencers" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of the influencer's participation (e.g., confirmed, pending, declined) */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the influencer in the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the influencer was added to the campaign */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the influencer's participation status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., impressions, clicks, conversions) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the metric's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_history" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call, meeting) */,
  "communication_details" TEXT /* Details of the communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the communication was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the communication details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_history_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketing, analytics, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer (optional) */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign (optional) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the access event's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or comments from the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the review was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the review's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_reviews_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data source (e.g., API, CSV, JSON) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sync with the external data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the external data source was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the external data source's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_external_data" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "data_key" TEXT /* Key of the external data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the external data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the external data was retrieved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the external data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the external data's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id", "source_id", "data_key")
)
